case_title: UNION BANK N.A. VS. JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 8.0 DAYS
DECLARATION OF FOSTER TEPPER IN SUPPORT OF OPPOS TO PETITIONER'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNION BANK N.A.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF UNION BANK N.A.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THE EXISTENCE OF AN ARBITRATION PROVISION IN 1978 AGREEMENT, BREACH OF WHICH IS ALLEGED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. CROSS-COMPLAIN ADMITS THAT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE PARTIES TO 1978 AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF WAIVED ITS RIGHT TO ARBITRATE WITH A PARTY TO THE 1978 AGREEMENT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, REPORTER NIKI MAKELA, CSR #11024 (MERRILL CORPORATION 415-357-4301).

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb; Petition; Submission Of Federal Authority
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Howard A. Slavitt for Union Bank N.A. the moving party/ Attorney Foster Tepper for Japan Center West Associates L.P. the opposing party.

Argued:PLAINTIFF UNION BANK N.A.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. Plaintiff has shown the existence of an Arbitration provision in 1978 Agreement, breach of which is alleged in the Cross-Complaint. Cross-Complain admits that plaintiff and defendant are parties to 1978 Agreement. Defendant failed to show that Plaintiff waived its right to arbitrate with a party to the 1978 Agreement. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Reporter Niki Makela, CSR #11024 (Merrill Corporation 415-357-4301). (501)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb; Petition; Submission Of Federal Authority
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNION BANK N.A.'S Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration is transferred to Department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on October 21, 2013. That department hears all real property/easement matters per San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
